tests.scenario: The app shall provide a consistent and easy-to-use meditation experience
steps: Set up precondition: a user with a consistent meditation practice.
Execute action: they open the app.
Observe system behavior and outputs.
tests.expected_result: they can easily navigate to their preferred meditation content.

tests.scenario: The app shall offer a free version with basic features
steps: Set up precondition: a user who is budget-conscious.
Execute action: they download the app.
Observe system behavior and outputs.
tests.expected_result: they can access basic meditation features for free.

tests.scenario: The app shall provide clear instructions and guidance for new
steps: Set up precondition: a new user.
Execute action: they start the app.
Observe system behavior and outputs.
tests.expected_result: they can access a beginner's guide to meditation and easy-to-follow instructions.

tests.scenario: The app shall offer a wide range of high-quality meditation
steps: Set up precondition: an experienced meditator.
Execute action: they search for meditation content.
Observe system behavior and outputs.
tests.expected_result: they can find a variety of high-quality sessions to choose from.

tests.scenario: The app shall resolve technical issues promptly to ensure a
steps: Set up precondition: a user experiencing technical issues.
Execute action: they report the issue.
Observe system behavior and outputs.
tests.expected_result: the support team shall respond within 24 hours and resolve the issue promptly.

tests.scenario: The app shall provide an easy way for users to
steps: Set up precondition: a user who wants to provide feedback.
Execute action: they access the app's support system.
Observe system behavior and outputs.
tests.expected_result: they can easily submit their feedback and suggestions.

tests.scenario: The app shall provide effective and accessible meditation tools for
steps: Set up precondition: a user seeking mental health support.
Execute action: they use the app's meditation tools.
Observe system behavior and outputs.
tests.expected_result: they can experience a reduction in stress and anxiety.

tests.scenario: The app shall allow users to customize their experience with
steps: Set up precondition: a user who wants to customize their experience.
Execute action: they access the app's settings.
Observe system behavior and outputs.
tests.expected_result: they can choose from a variety of features and updates to enhance their experience.

tests.scenario: The app shall provide an easy donation process for users
steps: Set up precondition: a user who wants to donate.
Execute action: they access the app's donation system.
Observe system behavior and outputs.
tests.expected_result: they can easily complete their donation using a preferred payment method.

tests.scenario: The app shall continue to improve and resolve technical issues
steps: Set up precondition: a long-term user.
Execute action: they experience technical issues.
Observe system behavior and outputs.
tests.expected_result: the support team shall resolve the issue promptly and provide a positive user experience.
